rulesApplied.newQuestionIdScheme: import_q001, import_q002, ... by first unique exact question text appearance
rulesApplied.newAnswerIdScheme: import_a0001, import_a0002, ... by retained answer row source order
rulesApplied.emptyAnswerRows: Blank source answer rows were removed as answers. If their question had no valid answers anywhere, one zero-answer question record was retained to preserve valid question text.
